header.title: REMix • Smart Alarm
header.subtitle: Wake in your optimal sleep stage with music and your daily briefing.

hero.title: What REMix does for you
hero.subtitle: REMix is a smart alarm and morning assistant that blends sleep science with personalization so your wake-up feels timely, useful, and low-friction.
hero.f1d: Triggers your alarm in an optimal window to reduce grogginess and help you start your day clearer.
hero.f2d: Adapts your wake soundtrack based on sleep quality and your selected podcast tone preferences.
hero.f3d: Combines schedule, weather, news, and optional horoscope into a concise morning summary.
hero.f4d: Integrates with Google Calendar and Spotify so your morning context and media are ready immediately.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Create your REMix account, then connect services and personalize your wake experience.
auth.profileLoadFailed: Signed in, but couldn’t load profile from API. Refresh in a second.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
auth.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

setup.title: Connect your services
setup.subtitle: Connect Google Calendar and Spotify, then set your wake/music preferences.

prefs.title: Wake & music preferences
prefs.subtitle: Set your wake window, podcast style, and morning briefing content.
prefs.podcastIncludesHelp: Choose what REMix should include in your morning podcast.
prefs.selectNewsRequired: Please select at least one news source.
